versions.version_description: Corrected to power chords, added fills.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Hit Me With Your Best Shot
Stuck In The Middle With You
I Was Made For Lovin You

content:
Video here - https://youtu.be/nsSx6nXpBMg

[Intro]
Drums            [ch]G[/ch]
| [ch]Em[/ch]      | [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  | (x2)
| [ch]Em[/ch]      | [ch]Em[/ch]      |

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
   Your love is like a tidal wave, spinning over my head[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  Drownin' me in your promises, better left unsaid[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
You're the right kind of sinner to release my inner fantasy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
The invincible winner and you know that you were born to be[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F#5[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Don't you mess around with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F#5[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Don't you mess around, no, no, no[/tab]

[Break]
| [ch]Em[/ch]      | [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  |
| [ch]Em[/ch]      | [ch]Em[/ch]      |

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
   Your love has set my soul on fire, burnin' out of control[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
   You taught me the ways of desire, now it's takin' its toll[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
You're the right kind of sinner to release my inner fantasy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
The invincible winner and you know that you were born to be[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F#5[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Don't you mess around with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F#5[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Don't you mess around, no, no, no[/tab]

[Break]
| [ch]Em[/ch]      | [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  | (x2)

[tab](When playing this part, the capo will be the nut, so a 0 is played as an open string)
e|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
B|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
G|-------------------------------0--------------------------4-----4-----4-----|
D|---0-2------------0---0-2--------4-2-0-----------4-2------------------------|
A|-------2-0----------4-----2--0---------3-2-0-2-3------2-2---2-2---2-2---2---|
E|-----------3-2--0-----------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] N.C.                    [ch]B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] N.C.    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] N.C.          [ch]B5[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch] [ch]F#5[/ch]
  You're the right kind of sinner to release my inner fanta-sy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] N.C.          [ch]B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] N.C.       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] N.C.            [ch]B[/ch]
  The invincible winner and you know that you were born to be[/tab]

[Chorus]
N.C.
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker
N.C.
Don't you mess around with me

[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F#5[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Don't you mess around with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Don't you mess around with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker, heartbreaker[/tab]

[Outro Solo]
| [ch]Em[/ch]      | [ch]G[/ch]       | [ch]A[/ch]       | [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]   | (x6)
  [ch]Em[/ch]
